description: May and Sarge wait outside the temple, discussing Sarge's inner conflict and May's hope that some part of Coulson remains. Their conversation is tense and emotional as May encourages Sarge to believe in his own goodness despite the looming darkness within him. They move toward the portal chamber as Daisy draws away Shrike-zombies.
location: Temple (Izel's gateway / portal site in the western United States)

transcript.line: I thought Daisy was going to lead them away.
That's her song. I hear it in my sleep.
It means she's close. To opening the gate, to summoning them last chance to walk away.
Whatever we're about to face in there, you'll do the right thing.
Because I know who you are.

Look, this isn't gonna be easy to hear, but if you're harboring any hope that after all this, I'm gonna turn into this “Coulson” guy, you gotta let that go. Do I want an alien passenger in my head? No. But if I kick it loose, what's left of me won't be the love of your life.
Maybe Phil Coulson is gone forever. I've accepted that. But I still believe there's good in you, even if it isn't him.
